description: Returns the target of the object airplane or helicopter [[Arma 3: Targeting config reference#class pilotCamera|pilotCamera]] tracking. Returns <sqf inline>[false, [0,0,0], objNull]</sqf> if camera is not in a tracking mode or if object has no [[Arma 3: Targeting config reference#class pilotCamera|pilotCamera]].
name: getPilotCameraTarget

ArraySized.desc: returns whether the camera is in a tracking mode
ArraySized.name: isTracking

ArraySized.desc: returns the position of the tracked area or object
ArraySized.name: targetPosition

ArraySized.desc: returns the tracked object, [[objNull]] if camera is only tracking an area
ArraySized.name: targetObject
